description: A feature works in training backfills but is missing or differently computed at serving time.
body: Failure mode: a feature is materialized only in the offline store or computed by serving-side code that differs from training, so the model receives nulls or mismatched values in production. Detection signals: serving logs showing null or default feature values, and an offline/online replay diff that is non-zero for the same entity and timestamp. Do not paper over it by imputing a default at serving — that hides the skew and biases predictions. Safer fallback: define the feature once in the store, materialize both offline and online from that definition, replay an entity through both paths to confirm equality, then re-evaluate the model before serving.
